data_description.host: Base URL of your StorageHub instance, e.g. https://storagehub.example.com
data_description.api_key: API key with read and search scopes (starts with shub_)

reauth_confirm.description: The StorageHub API key was rejected. Paste a new one to reconnect.

abort.instance_mismatch: The host you supplied points at a different StorageHub instance

search.name: Search inventory
search.description: Search StorageHub for items by name, owner, container, or location.

query.name: Query
query.description: Free-text search. Owner names AND-filter the results, so 'Sverre Bukser' returns only Sverre's pants.

limit.name: Limit
limit.description: Maximum number of items to return (1–50).

not_configured.message: StorageHub is not configured. Add the integration before calling its services.

auth_failed.message: StorageHub rejected the API key. Reconfigure the integration.
